Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Another option for attacking this contact is the QH-50D DASH (Drone Anti-Submarine Helicopter) aboard JDS Kikuzuki.

DASH is an unmanned remote-controlled drone helicopter which can drop a single Mark 46 torpedo on a submerged contact. These drones were phased out of USN service in the mid 1970s, but remained in use by the JMSDF into the early 1980s and were very successfully employed as a method to extend the range of the ship's torpedoes.
You can launch QH-50 DASH from the Flight Deck controls of JDS Kikuzuki if interested, or destroy the contact using your HSS-2B helicopter, or both.
